violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Box of pizza crusts being stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors and walls throughout the facility need to be cleaned. Box room is missing ceiling tiles and the fans have a build-up of dust and need to be cleaned.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food on the freezer floor.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Shelving in the walk-in cooler is rusted and no longer a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Outside and top of the pizza oven need to be cleaned. Shelving next to the pizza oven and knife holder need to be cleaned. Fans in the walk-in cooler need to be cleaned. Back of the monitors in the kitchen need to be cleaned. The lid on the ice-cream machine needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood systems above the pizza oven and chicken broasters needs to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Employee using a single serve container as a measuring cup.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Concrete floor in front of the fryers has exposed aggregate.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in freezer and cooler floors need to be cleaned. Ceilings in the pizza, chicken, dish, and box areas need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Numerous broken or missing tiles in the kitchen, dish area, and prep areas. Holes in the wall above the 3 compartment sink. Hole in the wall in the back storage area.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop placed in the bucket not allowed to dry properly.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
